ApiUrl.Name: Chronicle URL
ApiUrl.Hint: The base URL of your Chronicle instance (e.g., https://chronicle.example.com)

ApiKey.Name: API Key
ApiKey.Hint: API key with 'sync' permission from your Chronicle campaign settings

CampaignId.Name: Campaign ID
CampaignId.Hint: The UUID of your Chronicle campaign

SyncEnabled.Name: Enable Sync
SyncEnabled.Hint: Master toggle for all Chronicle sync features

SyncJournals.Name: Sync Journals
SyncJournals.Hint: Sync Chronicle entities with Foundry journal entries

SyncMaps.Name: Sync Maps
SyncMaps.Hint: Sync Chronicle maps with Foundry scenes (drawings, tokens)

SyncCalendar.Name: Sync Calendar
SyncCalendar.Hint: Sync Chronicle calendar with Calendaria or Simple Calendar module

SyncCharacters.Name: Sync Characters
SyncCharacters.Hint: Sync Foundry actors with Chronicle character entities (requires matching game system)

SyncNotes.Name: Sync Notes
SyncNotes.Hint: Sync Chronicle campaign notes with Foundry journal entries

Notifications.ConflictNewerChronicle: Conflict on "{name}" — Chronicle version was newer.
Notifications.ConflictNewerFoundry: Conflict on "{name}" — Foundry version was newer.
Notifications.MembersMatched: Auto-matched {count} Chronicle members to Foundry users.

Dashboard.Title: Chronicle Sync
Dashboard.NotConfiguredHint: Go to Module Settings to enter your Chronicle URL, API key, and Campaign ID.

Entities.EmptyState: No entities found. Create entities in Chronicle or journals in Foundry to get started.

Bulk.ConfirmChangeType: Change entity type for {count} selected entities?
Bulk.ConfirmDelete: Permanently delete {count} selected entities from Chronicle? This cannot be undone.

Maps.NoMaps: No maps found in this Chronicle campaign.

Shops.NoShops: No shops found in this campaign.
Shops.NoShopsHint: Create shop entities in Chronicle to see them here.
Shops.NoShopTypeHint: Add a "Shop" entity type to your campaign in Chronicle.

Calendar.NoCalendar: No calendar configured for this campaign in Chronicle.
Calendar.Disabled: Calendar sync is disabled. Enable it in Module Settings.
Calendar.NoModuleHint: Install Calendaria or Simple Calendar to enable calendar sync.

Notes.NoNotesHint: Notes created in Chronicle will appear here when note sync is enabled.

Characters.NoActorsHint: Create character actors in Foundry or character entities in Chronicle.
Characters.DisabledHint: Enable "Sync Characters" in Module Settings to sync actors with Chronicle.
Characters.NoSystem: Character sync requires a matching game system.
Characters.NoSystemHint: Your Foundry system must match a Chronicle game system with character field templates.

Dashboard.OfflineWarning: Sync messages are queued while disconnected, but the queue is limited. Extended offline periods may cause missed updates — use Pull All after reconnecting to ensure consistency.

Wizard.Title: Chronicle Import Wizard
Wizard.Hint: Guided import of your Foundry world into Chronicle — maps folders to entity types, suggests tags, and bulk-imports content.
Wizard.ConnectDesc: Verifying connection to Chronicle and detecting your campaign configuration.
Wizard.NoSystemMatch: No matching game system found — character sync will be skipped.
Wizard.ScanDesc: Scanning your Foundry world for journals, actors, scenes, and items that aren't yet synced with Chronicle.
Wizard.TypesDesc: Map each Foundry folder to a Chronicle entity type. Documents in that folder will be created as that type in Chronicle.
Wizard.NoFolders: No unsynced documents found in your world.
Wizard.TagsDesc: Auto-generated tags from your folder names and actor types. Toggle, rename, or remove as needed.
Wizard.CharactersDesc: Select which actors to import as Chronicle character entities. Mark PCs and NPCs.
Wizard.CalendarDesc: Choose how to sync your calendar between Foundry and Chronicle.
Wizard.MapsDesc: Link Foundry scenes to Chronicle maps. Scenes with matching names are auto-suggested.
Wizard.ReviewSummary: The following operations will be performed:
Wizard.NoPlan: No import plan generated — go back and configure at least one step.
